name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Registry
notes: This building block detects when HyperStack registries are discovered.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, System.Service Installed

when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES '.*?hklm\\system\\currentcontrolset\\services\\lanmanserver\\parameters\\nullsessionpipes.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '.*?hklm\\system\\currentcontrolset\\services\\lanmanserver\\parameters\\nullsessionpipes.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES '.*?hklm\system\currentcontrolset\control\lsa\restrict anonymous.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '.*?hklm\system\currentcontrolset\control\lsa\restrict anonymous.*') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, System.Service Installed

AND when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES '.*?hklm\\system\\currentcontrolset\\services\\lanmanserver\\parameters\\nullsessionpipes.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '.*?hklm\\system\\currentcontrolset\\services\\lanmanserver\\parameters\\nullsessionpipes.*') OR LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES '.*?hklm\system\currentcontrolset\control\lsa\restrict anonymous.*') OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '.*?hklm\system\currentcontrolset\control\lsa\restrict anonymous.*') AQL filter query
